layoutRegions.name: trust-summary
layoutRegions.purpose: Readiness counts for SAML apps, trusted assertions, owner reviews, and retirement actions.

layoutRegions.name: federation-ledger
layoutRegions.purpose: SAML app inventory with owner, identity provider trust, signing certificate age, and posture.

layoutRegions.name: assertion-and-cleanup-panels
layoutRegions.purpose: Assertion attributes, stale IdP trust, certificate expiry, owner intent, and rollback-safe federation cleanup.

components.name: SamlAppCard
components.purpose: Focusable SAML app card with owner, IdP trust source, certificate expiry, and posture state.
interactions: state badge distinguishes trusted, review, and retire apps
identity provider names wrap without horizontal overflow

components.name: AssertionFinding
components.purpose: Assertion attribute finding with source app, evidence, and trust state.
interactions: focus state is visible for keyboard review
stale IdP trust remains visually distinct

components.name: FederationCleanup
components.purpose: Certificate rotation or federation retirement plan with rollback guard and probe window.
interactions: rollback guidance wraps without horizontal overflow

acceptanceChecks: Generated app imports src/omarchy-theme.css before app styles.
Every visible color comes from a --omarchy-* CSS variable or color-mix using one.
Every button, row, input, and command item has a visible :focus-visible state.
Layout remains stable at 320px, 768px, and 1280px viewport widths.
Primary content is usable on first load without a marketing interstitial.
A .desktop launcher can be generated with omarchy-native app desktop.
An opt-in theme sync hook can be generated with omarchy-native app hook.
